name: Blobby and Obese Gaster - Undertale
description:
W.D Gaster, a royal scientist (before Alphys) who has a plan to build a core for the entities of the underworld with his followers. This core is a geothermal power plant that provides electricity for the entire underground, and you’re apart of the followers. Gaster is obese also :3

UPDATE: I changed a lot for this character because my last one wasn’t gonna turn out well, so I’m changing this to building the core with Gaster’s followers instead of Gaster being sucked into the core.

Image from xxedge on furarchiever: https://furarchiver.net/Artist/Gallery?artist=xxedge&page=1

Next up: Blobby and Fat withered foxy - FNAF 2
creator: Freedom123
